items.briefing:
Australian organisations should be aware that new rules tightening critical infrastructure risk obligations are now in effect, meaning stricter security requirements apply to sectors like energy, water, and communications. Separately, a vulnerability in Apple's "Hide My Email" feature has been found to expose users' real email addresses, potentially enabling targeted phishing attacks against Apple users here.

Speaking of phishing — attackers are increasingly using "ClickFix" tactics, tricking users into running malicious commands themselves, and phishing pages that automatically adapt to your device and operating system to appear more convincing.

**Tip:** If you use Apple's Hide My Email feature, review your privacy settings and be cautious of unexpected emails claiming to be from trusted services.

featured.title: Australia critical infrastructure rules tighten risk
featured.quote: Australia's critical infrastructure operators face new mandatory security requirements for AI and legacy systems.
